Description: Topsoil — dark brown silty loam with frequent root bioturbation
Ploughsoil — mid brown silty clay with occasional CBM fragments
Demolition layer — mortar-rich rubble with tegula and imbrex fragments
Robber trench cut — linear cut truncating villa walls
Robber trench fill — mixed dark silty clay with mortar and tile
Collapse deposit — tipped wall plaster and painted ceiling fragments
Occupation layer — dark grey-brown silty loam with charcoal and Samian pottery
Hearth rake-out — burnt clay with abundant charcoal
Floor make-up — compacted yellow clay bedding for opus signinum floor
Opus signinum floor surface — pinkish-red waterproof mortar floor
Wall foundation — mortared limestone rubble E-W alignment
Wall foundation — mortared limestone rubble N-S alignment
Construction cut for wall 110 — into natural gravels
Construction cut for wall 111 — into natural gravels
Make-up layer — compacted gravel and crushed chalk
Pit fill — dark grey organic silty clay with charcoal and oyster shell
Natural substrate — yellow-brown sandy gravel with clay lenses
